layout.platformText: A unified platform for search, monitoring, and analytics.

login.title: Sign in
login.description: Sign in to continue to your workspace.

register.title: Create account
register.description: Create your account to get started.

forgotPassword.title: Password recovery
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Set a new password for your account.

confirmPassword.title: Confirm your password
confirmPassword.description: Please confirm your password to continue.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email
verifyEmail.description: Please confirm your email address to continue.
verifyEmail.statusMessage: A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.

authCode.title: Authentication code
authCode.description: Enter the code from your authenticator app.

recoveryCode.title: Recovery code
recoveryCode.description: Enter one of your recovery codes to continue.
